title: Huawei Option 43
content:
Huawei Option 43 Online Calculator# In WLAN deployment, APs typically obtain the WAC’s IP address through the DHCP Option 43 field. This tool can be used to quickly calculate the Option 43 Hex configuration string.
WAC IP Address 1: WAC IP Address 2 (Optional, active/standby scenario): Calculate Option 43 Calculation Result: Calculation Instructions# The format of Huawei Option 43 field is usually: 03 (sub-option type) + Length (hexadecimal, 1 byte) + ASCII Hexadecimal of comma-separated IP string.
Single IP Example: Input 192.168.1.1 (length 11 bytes, hexadecimal is 0B) Output: 030B3139322E3136382E312E31
Dual IP Example: Input 192.168.1.1 and 192.168.1.2, concatenated as 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.2 (length 23 bytes, hexadecimal is 17) Output: 03173139322E3136382E312E312C3139322E3136382E312E32 (Note: According to the standard, when configuring two IP addresses, the calculation length should be the total length of the two IPs and the comma, which is 17.)

title: IP & Subnet Calculator
content:
IP & Subnet Calculator# This tool provides network address calculations, subnet mask conversions, and wildcard mask calculations.
1. Network Address Calculator IP Address & Prefix (e.g., 192.168.1.2/25): Calculate 2. Mask & Host Calculator Subnet Mask or Prefix Length (e.g., 25 or 255.255.255.128): Calculate 3. Wildcard Mask Calculator Subnet Mask (e.g., 255.255.255.0): Calculate 4. IP Range to Subnets (CIDR) IP Range (e.g., 192.168.1.0-192.168.1.65): Calculate

title: Network Tools
content:
Networking Toolkit Essential utilities for network engineering, configuration, and diagnostics.
🧮 Huawei Option 43 Quickly calculate DHCP Option 43 hexadecimal strings for Huawei WLAN AP deployments.
🌐 IP & Subnet Calculate network addresses, subnets, usable hosts, and convert wildcard masks easily.
🔍 Public IP Lookup Automatically detect your public IP and look up detailed location, ASN, and ISP info for any IP.
🛠️ Batch Config Generator Automatically generate repetitive configuration scripts or JSON based on templates with dynamic variables.
